title: Students Helping Young Students Act of 2025
short_title: Students Helping Young Students Act of 2025
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
crs_summary: Students Helping Young Students Act of 2025 This bill expands the Federal Work-Study Program to include work-study programs at institutions of higher education that compensate students who are employed in educational after-school, before-school, or nonschool community service activities at public elementary and secondary schools.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
